member.summary: Provider that allows to use internal controllers.

member.summary: Base class for internal controllers.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Controllers.InternalSupport.InternalControllersExtension
member.summary: Extension methods for enabling internal controllers in the application.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Controllers.InternalSupport.InternalControllersExtension.EnableInternalControllers(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IMvcBuilder)
member.summary: Enables the use of internal controllers in the application.
member.param: Service builder object.
member.returns: MVC builder object to allow using fluent syntax.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.ApplicationDbContext
member.summary: Database context that represents a session with the database.

member.summary: Instance logger.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.ApplicationDbContext.SwapProviderSet
member.summary: Collection that stores swap providers and parameters of their latest offer, or null if it is not initialized yet.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.ApplicationDbContext.SwapProviders
member.summary: Collection that stores swap providers and parameters of their latest offer.

member.summary: Creates model for the swap providers table.
member.param: Database model builder.

member.summary: Factory for the database context.

member.summary: Creates a database context.

member.summary: Collection of database repository locks.

member.summary: List of existing repositories.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.log
member.summary: Instance logger.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.locks
member.summary: Database repository locks mapped to the name of the repositories.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.disposedValueLock
member.summary: Lock object to be used when accessing .

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.disposedValue
member.summary: Set to true if the object was disposed already, false otherwise. Used by the dispose pattern.
member.remarks: All access has to be protected by .

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the object.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.GetLock(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a database lock for the given repository.
member.param: Name of the repository.
member.returns: Database lock for the given repository.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbLocks.DisposeCoreAsync
member.summary: Frees managed resources used by the object.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous dispose operation.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider
member.summary: Description of a license in the database.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.Pubkey
member.summary: Public key of the swap provider as a hex string.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.LastSeen
member.summary: UTC time when the provider was last seen.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.PoWBits
member.summary: Amount of PoW the provider used for its profile.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.PercentageFeeForward
member.summary: Forward swap provider fee in percent.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.PercentageFeeReverse
member.summary: Reverse swap provider fee in percent.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.MinAmountForwardSat
member.summary: Minimum amount for a forward swap in satoshis.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.MinAmountReverseSat
member.summary: Minimum amount for a reverse swap in satoshis.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.MaxAmountForwardSat
member.summary: Maximum amount for a forward swap in satoshis.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.MaxAmountReverseSat
member.summary: Maximum amount for a reverse swap in satoshis.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.MiningFeeForwardSat
member.summary: Mining fee for forward swaps in satoshis.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.MiningFeeReverseSat
member.summary: Mining fee for reverse swaps in satoshis.
member.remarks: The setter is needed for the serializer.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty instance of the object.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.DbSwapProvider.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the object.
member.param: Public key of the swap provider as a hex string.
UTC time when the provider was last seen.
Amount of PoW the provider used for its profile.
Forward swap provider fee in percent.
Reverse swap provider fee in percent.
Minimum amount for a forward swap in satoshis.
Minimum amount for a reverse swap in satoshis.
Maximum amount for a forward swap in satoshis.
Maximum amount for a reverse swap in satoshis.
Mining fee for forward swaps in satoshis.
Mining fee for reverse swaps in satoshis.

member.summary: Instance logger.

member.summary: Factory for the database context.

member.summary: Database repository lock.

member.summary: Creates a new instance of the object.
member.param: Factory for the database context.
Collection of database repository locks.
Name of the repository.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.Repository.SwapProviderRepository
member.summary: Provider of access to countries in the database.

member.summary: Creates a new instance of the object.
member.param: Factory for the database context.
Collection of database repository locks.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.Repository.SwapProviderRepository.UpsertAsync(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Inserts or updates a swap provider in the database.
member.param: Public key of the swap provider as a hex string.
UTC time when the provider was last seen.
Amount of PoW the provider used for its profile.
Forward swap provider fee in percent.
Reverse swap provider fee in percent.
Minimum amount for a forward swap in satoshis.
Minimum amount for a reverse swap in satoshis.
Maximum amount for a forward swap in satoshis.
Maximum amount for a reverse swap in satoshis.
Mining fee for forward swaps in satoshis.
Mining fee for reverse swaps in satoshis.
member.exception: Thrown when the database operation fails.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Data.Repository.SwapProviderRepository.GetRecentAsync(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets list of swap providers that has been seen recently.
member.param: UTC timestamp after which all the returned providers must have been seen.
member.returns: Returns a list of swap providers.
member.exception: Thrown when the database operation fails.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Exceptions.DatabaseException
member.summary: Exception for cases when a database operation fails.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Exceptions.DatabaseException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Exceptions.DatabaseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Exceptions.DatabaseException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.

member.summary: Key identifier of the Electrum RPC user name string.

member.summary: Loads Electrum RPC configuration section from the application settings file.
member.param: Section of the application settings file that contains Electrum RPC configuration.

member.summary: Gets a required string value from the application configuration.

member.summary: Application configuration for Electrum RPC connection.

member.summary: Electrum RPC user name.

member.summary: Electrum RPC password.

member.summary: Creates a new instance of the object.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock
member.summary: Synchronization object used to prevent race conditions with disposable release via .

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.log
member.summary: Instance logger.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.ErrorCancelled
member.summary: Error indicating that waiting for the lock was cancelled.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.lockObject
member.summary: Lock object itself.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.instanceName
member.summary: Name of the instance for logging purposes only.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.disposedValueLock
member.summary: Lock object to be used when accessing .

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.disposedValue
member.summary: Set to true if the object was disposed already, false otherwise. Used by the dispose pattern.
member.remarks: All access has to be protected by .

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the object.
member.param: Name of the instance for logging purposes only.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.Enter
member.summary:
Acquires the lock and provides interface for its releasing.
Acquired lock must be released via .
member.returns: interface that should be used to release the acquired lock.

member.name: P:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.IsLocked
member.summary: Gets if the lock is locked or not.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.Release
member.summary: Releases lock previously acquired using or .

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.DisposeInternalSync
member.summary: Synchronously frees managed resources used by the object.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.DisposeCoreAsync
member.summary: Frees managed resources used by the object.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous dispose operation.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.AsyncLock.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Frees resources used by the object. Both kinds of resources managed and unmanaged are freed based on whether the method is called from or not.
member.param: true if the method is called from , false otherwise.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.DisposableReleaser
member.summary: Disposable interface that allows releasing the underlying object.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.DisposableReleaser.releasableObject
member.summary: Underlying releasable object with which this releaser is bound.

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.DisposableReleaser.disposedValueLock
member.summary: Lock object to be used when accessing .

member.name: F:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.DisposableReleaser.disposedValue
member.summary: Set to true if the object was disposed already, false otherwise. Used by the dispose pattern.
member.remarks: All access has to be protected by .

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.DisposableReleaser.#ctor(WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.IReleasable)
member.summary: Creates a new releaser bound to an underlying releasable object.
member.param: Acquired releasable object.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.DisposableReleaser.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Frees resources used by the object. Both kinds of resources managed and unmanaged are freed based on whether the method is called from or not.
member.param: true if the method is called from , false otherwise.

member.name: T:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.IReleasable
member.summary: Interface for releasable synchronization primitives.

member.name: M:WhalesExchangeBackend.Utils.Sync.IReleasable.Release
member.summary: Releases the acquired synchronization object.
